issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. 'During this turn' means the effect lasts through the current turn phase; 'EndOfTurn' would clear it at end of turn but doesn't capture the 'during' semantics correctly.
Target should specify 'up to 1' character. Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' does not enforce the 'up to 1' limit; should be 'ChooseUpTo1OpponentCharacter' or equivalent.
